root_structure..crustagent/: Project intelligence, skills, memory, truthpack, and stability locks
root_structure.src/server/: Backend feature clusters (db, routes, middleware, utils)

npm_scripts.scuttle:prod-start: build && NODE_ENV=production tsx server.ts & vite preview (UI+API :4545 + :4646, both 0.0.0.0)

gotchas: tsx --watch does NOT support --ignore flag on Node v22 — it will crash silently. Never add --ignore to tsx --watch.
npm rebuild better-sqlite3 required after Node runtime upgrades (binary mismatch).
sessionStorage is used for token persistence — NOT IndexedDB. Cleared on browser close.
Dev server: localhost:4545 (not on LAN). Prod preview: 0.0.0.0:4545 (LAN-accessible).
scuttle:prod-start builds frontend first (npm run build), then starts Express + vite preview.
